  • Classes in com.gpudb.filesystem used by com.gpudb.filesystem
    Class
    Description
    GPUdbFileHandler.Options
    This class models the options available for modifying some behaviors of the GPUdbFileHandler class.
    MultiPartUploadInfo.MultiPartOperation
    This enum specifies the different operations/states that a multi-part file upload could go through.
  • Classes in com.gpudb.filesystem used by com.gpudb.filesystem.common
    Class
    Description
    MultiPartDownloadInfo
    This class packages and mimics certain important attributes of a multi-part download operation.
    MultiPartUploadInfo
    This class packages and mimics certain important attributes of a multi-part upload operation.
